content_body:
When planning your North Georgia vacation, deciding whether or not to bring your furry friend is always a question. However, visiting Blue Ridge provides the best solution simply because of how pet-friendly it is! From pet-friendly cabin rentals to pet festivals and from hiking trails to pet-friendly shops, this destination is the perfect place to bring everyone you love. Take a look at the best pet-friendly places in Blue Ridge to start planning your pup-tastic vacation!

Hiking:

Since Blue Ridge is known for its breathtaking mountain ranges, the beginning of the Appalachian Trail, and so many other outdoor excursions, bring your pup with you for some exercise and a ball of a good time! The Swinging Bridge is one of our favorite pet-friendly hikes in Blue Ridge, and this easy trail is the perfect place to let loose, enjoying peaceful scenery, and play in the river! Nearby, Fall Branch Falls and Long Creek Falls are two of Blue Ridge's adored waterfalls, and these beautiful destinations are the perfect way to tire out your four-legged friend.

Restaurants:

One frequently asked question about Blue Ridge is which restaurants are pet friendly? The short answer: most of them! Many North Georgia restaurants welcome pets with open arms since several have outdoor patios. Dine overlooking the Toccoa River at Toccoa Riverside Restaurant, which even boasts a dog menu! In downtown Blue Ridge, Masseria and Harvest on Main are known for their pet-friendly atmosphere and delicious food, and, in nearby McCaysville, Burra Burra On The River and Twisted Tomato welcome pets with their expansive outdoor seating on the river.

Providing a pet paradise, Rin Tin's Barks and Brews is a must for your cabin trip! With a large, full-service bar, restaurant, and dognasium, this hidden gem checks off all the boxes for both you  and your pet. If you need a day to experience Blue Ridge without your pet, schedule a playdate for them at Rin Tin's.

Shopping:

Similarly to restaurants, many shops will allow pets (make sure to always ask!), but here are a few of our favorite pet-friendly shops in downtown Blue Ridge. Love Dogs and Cats Too has been a staple of the area for many years, and this boutique pet stores provides the perfect new toy  or accessory for your furry friend!

Blue Ridge Cotton Company and their sister store Gather also welcome pets with open arms and even donate a percentage of their proceeds to charity! Their thoughtful products ranging from journals to clothing to pet products and household items will be sure to satisfy your need for retail therapy.

For the art lovers, stop by High Country Art with your pet and revel in the beauty of some locally created art. Finally, visit Blue Ridge Adventure Wear to find the perfect outdoorsy fit, a souvenir glass from Blue Ridge, or a treat for your pet!

Breweries and Wineries:

A haven for craft brewers and wine connoisseurs, North Georgia boasts a plethora of breweries and wineries. Visit Grumpy Old Men Brewing or Buck Bald Brewing with your pet while exploring the Blue Ridge area! Enjoy an adult beverage with all of your best friends at these locations! For the wine-enjoyers, Bear Claw Vineyards is a place to go with your furry friend.

Dog Parks:

We all know that sometimes you just need to play fetch and run in big open spaces! The Haven Dog Park is located 3 minutes from downtown Blue Ridge and is the perfect spot to throw a ball around and get some energy out. Ramping up the idea of a standard dog park, Blue Ridge Adventure Dog offers a play zone for your furry friend and adult beverages for you!

Paws in the Park:

Visit during the most beautiful time of year (late October) and experience a local festival dedicated to pets! Paws in the Park, sponsored by the local Humane Society. Experience a pet parade, costume competition, local vendors, and more!

Pet-Friendly Cabins:

Planning your Blue Ridge getaway starts with finding the perfect luxury cabin for your group. Luckily, most of our cabins consider pets! Check out our top 2 best cabins for pets:

Serendipity on Noontootla Creek ~ 5 Bedrooms, 5.5 Bathrooms, Sleeps 10

Boasting access to the Noontootla Creek, this spacious lodge is perfect for a family getaway or a couples retreat! Don't stress about finding a pet sitter when you can just bring your pup with you!

Aska Escape Lodge ~ 3 Bedrooms, 3 Bathrooms, Sleeps 6

Located only a few minutes away from several hiking trails and waterfalls, Aska Escape Lodge is the perfect vacation rental if spending time in the outdoors is a priority during your North Georgia getaway!
title: Planning Your Pet-Friendly Vacation in Blue Ridge, GA
